page: Amazon Web Services i3en.xlarge is a storage-optimized server instance built on the Nitro hypervisor. It features an Intel Xeon 8259CL processor with 4 vCPUs, derived from 2 physical cores with hyper-threading, operating at 3.1 GHz. The system is equipped with 32.0 GB of DDR4 memory running at 3 GHz, providing a memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per core. A key hardware feature is the inclusion of 2500 GB of local NVMe SSD storage, designed for applications requiring substantial local storage capacity.

Benchmark data indicates that the CPU and memory performance of the i3en.xlarge falls primarily into the lower tiers. Single-core and multi-core CPU performance tests, such as stress-ng and Geekbench, place the instance in the bottom 25% of evaluated systems. Memory bandwidth tests for both small and large blocks also register in the bottom 25%, though the Passmark memory score achieves an average rating in the middle 50%. Cryptographic and compression benchmarks, including gzip and bzip3, similarly reflect weak to poor performance. The baseline network bandwidth is rated at 4 Gbps.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the i3en.xlarge offers a high density of local NVMe SSD storage and DDR4 memory relative to its compute resources, making it a specialized choice where storage volume is prioritized over raw processing power. The instance is suited for storage-intensive workloads, local databases, caching layers, and data-serving applications that benefit from large local storage footprints but do not require high-performance CPU capabilities.
description: Amazon Web Services i3en.xlarge is a storage-optimized instance powered by the Nitro hypervisor and an Intel Xeon 8259CL processor. It features 4 vCPUs, 32.0 GB of DDR4 memory, and a substantial 2500 GB of local NVMe SSD storage. While the instance provides high local storage capacity and a balanced 8.0 GB of memory per core, benchmark results show that its CPU and memory bandwidth performance generally fall into the bottom 25% tier. The Passmark memory score represents an exception, performing in the middle 50% tier. With a baseline network bandwidth of 4 Gbps, this instance is qualitatively cost-efficient for storage-heavy configurations. It is best suited for databases, caching systems, and storage-intensive applications that require large local NVMe capacities but have moderate computational demands.

tagline: A storage-optimized instance featuring high-capacity local NVMe SSD storage and balanced memory for data-intensive workloads with moderate compute requirements.
bullet_points: Equipped with 2500 GB of local NVMe SSD storage for high-capacity local data access.
Features 4 vCPUs powered by an Intel Xeon 8259CL processor running at 3.1 GHz.
Includes 32.0 GB of DDR4 memory, providing 8.0 GB of RAM per core.
Delivers a baseline network bandwidth of 4 Gbps.
Best suited for databases, caching layers, and storage-intensive applications.
